variables.input:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "n8n" and isNotNull(n8n.workflow.id)
| summarize WorkflowIDs = collectDistinct(n8n.workflow.id)
| expand WorkflowIDs
| fields values = arrayRemoveNulls(array("ALL", WorkflowIDs))

1.query:
fetch logs
| search("n8n.audit")
| parse content, """JSON {JSON {STRING:workflowId}:payload}:all"""
| filter in($WorkflowID , "ALL") OR in(all[payload][workflowId], $WorkflowID)
| parse content, "JSON:json_content"
| fieldsAdd payloadContent = json_content[payload]
| filter json_content[eventName] != "n8n.audit.workflow.executed"
| fields timestamp, json_content[eventName], payloadContent

13.query:
fetch logs
| search("n8n.workflow.started")
| parse content, """JSON {JSON {STRING:workflowId}:payload}:all"""
| filter in($WorkflowID , "ALL") OR in(all[payload][workflowId], $WorkflowID)
| summarize count()

16.query:
fetch logs
| search("n8n.workflow.success")
| parse content, """JSON {JSON {STRING:workflowId}:payload}:all"""
| filter in($WorkflowID , "ALL") OR in(all[payload][workflowId], $WorkflowID)
| summarize count()

17.query:
fetch logs
| search("n8n.workflow.failed")
| parse content, """JSON {JSON {STRING:workflowId}:payload}:all"""
| filter in($WorkflowID , "ALL") OR in(all[payload][workflowId], $WorkflowID)
| summarize count()

21.title: Workflow Execution Log

22.title: Workflow Runs by Status
22.query:
fetch logs
| search("n8n.workflow.failed" or "n8n.workflow.success")
| parse content, """JSON {JSON {STRING:workflowId}:payload}:all"""
| filter in($WorkflowID , "ALL") OR in(all[payload][workflowId], $WorkflowID)
| parse content, "JSON:json_content"
| fieldsAdd 
    workflowName = json_content[`payload`][`workflowName`],
    status = if(matchesPhrase(content, "n8n.workflow.failed"), "failed", else: "success")
| summarize 
    success = countIf(status == "success"),
    failed = countIf(status == "failed"),
  by: { workflowName }

28.title: Total Token Usage by LLM Model

33.title: Errors
33.query:
fetch logs, scanLimitGBytes: 500
| search("n8n.workflow")
| parse content, "JSON:json_content"
| fieldsAdd payload = json_content[payload]
| fieldsAdd realTS = json_content[ts]
| fieldsAdd errorMessage = payload[errorMessage]
| fields realTS, executionID = payload[`executionId`], eventName = json_content[`eventName`], workflowID = payload[`workflowId`], isManual = payload[`isManual`], workflowName = payload[`workflowName`], errorMessage
| filter in($WorkflowID , "ALL") OR in(workflowID, $WorkflowID)
| sort executionID, realTS
| summarize t = collectArray(record(realTS = toTimestamp(realTS), eventName, workflowID, workflowName, errorMessage)), by:{executionID}
| fieldsAdd workflowStatus = if(isNotNull(splitString(t[1][eventName], ".")[2]), if(splitString(t[1][eventName], ".")[2] == "success", "✅ Success", else: "❌ Error"), else: "🔜 Running...")
| fieldsAdd errorMessage = if(t[1][eventName] == "n8n.workflow.failed", t[1][errorMessage], else: (if(isNull(t[0][errorMessage]), "", else: t[0][errorMessage])))
| filter workflowStatus == "❌ Error" and isNotNull(errorMessage) and errorMessage != ""
| summarize count(), by: { errorMessage }
| sort `count()` desc

34.title: Workflow Response time Time Series
34.query:
fetch spans
| filter dt.service.name == "n8n" and request.is_root_span == true and isNotNull(n8n.workflow.name)
| makeTimeseries avg_response_time = avg(duration/1000000000), by: { n8n.workflow.name}, interval: 1m

39.title: Top 5 NodeTypes by Token Usage

42.query: timeseries { sum(n8n_ai_llm_error_total), value.A = sum(n8n_ai_llm_error_total, scalar: true) }

43.query: timeseries { count(n8n_audit_workflow_created_total), value.A = count(n8n_audit_workflow_created_total, scalar: true) }, filter: { in(workflow_id, { $WorkflowID }) OR in($WorkflowID, { "ALL" }) }

44.query: timeseries { count(n8n_audit_workflow_updated_total), value.A = count(n8n_audit_workflow_updated_total, scalar: true) }, filter: { in(workflow_id, { $WorkflowID }) OR in($WorkflowID, { "ALL" }) }

45.query: timeseries { count(n8n_audit_workflow_executed_total), value.A = count(n8n_audit_workflow_executed_total, scalar: true) }, filter: { in(workflow_id, { $WorkflowID }) OR in($WorkflowID, { "ALL" }) }

46.query: timeseries { count(n8n_audit_workflow_activated_total), value.A = count(n8n_audit_workflow_activated_total, scalar: true) }, filter: { in(workflow_id, { $WorkflowID }) OR in($WorkflowID, { "ALL" }) }

47.query: timeseries { sum(n8n_ai_document_processed_total), value.A = count(n8n_ai_document_processed_total, scalar: true) }

54.title: Faulty Workflow Nodes by Error Count
54.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "n8n" and matchesPhrase(span.name, "node.execute")
| summarize
    total = count(),
    errors = countIf(span.status_code == "error")
  , by: { n8n.node.name }
| sort errors desc

56.title: Slow Workflow Nodes by Execution Duration
56.query:
fetch spans
| filter service.name == "n8n" and matchesPhrase(span.name, "node.execute")
| summarize
    duration = sum(duration)
  , by: { n8n.node.name }
| sort duration desc
